title: Surgeon Vacancy at Suven Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Suven Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Suven Pharmaceuticals in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals:
Suven Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals!
